project_area: Customer service, employee service, contact center, AI agents, and support platform solutions
demographic_requirements: Open to organizations supporting refugees, asylum seekers, immigrants, and vulnerable populations (e.g., single parents, pregnant women, large families, elderly, people with disabilities). Specific focus on startups, nonprofits, and social impact organizations.
eligibility_summary: Eligible applicants include startups, nonprofits, social impact organizations, and businesses focused on supporting refugees, asylum seekers, immigrants, and underserved communities. Geographic restrictions are global, with specific programs targeting vulnerable populations in the U.S., Denmark, Montreal, and worldwide.
